HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

10
11#include <iostream>
12#include <string>
13#include <thread>
14#include <vector>
15#include "CLParser.h"
16#include "GreenF.h"
17#include "JobParser.h"
18#include "SIEFormPMCHW.h"
19#include "SimJob.h"
20#include "SurfaceMesh.h"
21
41int main(int argc, char *argv[]) {
42 // ----------------------
43 // Defaults for arguments
44 // ----------------------
45 std::string jobFile("input.job");
46 std::string outPrefix("");
47 bool help(false);
48 bool NeedsAccurate(false);
49 int solver(2);
50 int etm(1);
51 std::string tableFile("");
52 int threads(1);
53
54 // ----------------------
55 // Declare supported CLI options
56 // ----------------------
57 std::vector<CLParser *> clParser;
58 clParser.push_back(new CLStringOption("-j", &jobFile));
59 clParser.push_back(new CLStringOption("-op", &outPrefix));
60 clParser.push_back(new CLOption<int>("-l", &solver));
61 clParser.push_back(new CLStringOption("-t", &tableFile));
62 clParser.push_back(new CLFlag("--help", &help));
63 clParser.push_back(new CLFlag("-a", &NeedsAccurate));
64 clParser.push_back(new CLOption<int>("-etm", &etm));
65 clParser.push_back(new CLOption<int>("-th", &threads));
66
67 // ----------------------
68 // Parse CLI and override defaults
69 // ----------------------
70 for (std::vector<CLParser *>::iterator pIter = clParser.begin();
71 pIter != clParser.end(); pIter++) {
72 (*pIter)->Parse(argc, argv);
73 }
74
75 // ----------------------
76 // Help or execution
77 // ----------------------
78 if (help) {
79 std::cout << "HELIOS SIE program : Casimir computation" << std::endl;
80 } else {
81 SimJob *job = new SimJob;
82
83 // Enable more accurate quadrature if requested
84 if (NeedsAccurate) GreenF::EnableAccurate();
85
86 // Sanitize thread count
87 if (threads < 1 or threads > std::thread::hardware_concurrency()) {
88 threads = std::thread::hardware_concurrency();
89 }
90 SIEFormPMCHW::AssignThreads(threads);
91 SimJob::AssignThreads(threads);
92
93 // Run Casimir computation
94 return job->Casimir(jobFile, outPrefix);
95 }
96 return 0;
97}
98
CLParser.h
Minimal command-line argument parsing utilities.
GreenF.h
Abstract base class for electromagnetic Green's functions.
JobParser.h
Lightweight XML-like tag parser for the solver job file.
SIEFormPMCHW.h
Header file for the SIEFormPMCHW class.
SimJob.h
Orchestrates a full simulation run: parse job/subjobs, build the linear system, solve it,...
SurfaceMesh.h
Declaration of the SurfaceMesh class and mesh edge struct.
main
int main(int argc, char *argv[])
Main driver routine for the simulation program.

CLFlag
Boolean flag option with no argument.
Definition CLParser.h:176
CLOption
Typed option expecting a value (e.g., "-th 8", "-l 2").
Definition CLParser.h:69
CLStringOption
Option that captures a string argument.

GreenF::EnableAccurate
static void EnableAccurate()
Request high‑accuracy evaluation paths (global).
Definition GreenF.cpp:90
SIEFormPMCHW::AssignThreads
static void AssignThreads(int t)
Configure how many threads to use for parallel assembly.
Definition SIEFormPMCHW.cpp:474
SimJob
High-level driver for SIE simulations and field evaluation.
Definition SimJob.h:43
SimJob::Casimir
int Casimir(std::string jobFile, std::string outPrefix)
Casimir workflow entry (uses gradient matrices if enabled).
Definition SimJob.cpp:644
SimJob::AssignThreads
static void AssignThreads(int t)
Set thread count used internally by SimJob.
